with:
  # ----- genre -----
          genre_objs = [t.object for t in triples_here if t.predicate == "genre"]
          if genre_objs:
              # Build a phrase that lists all genres and their related information
              genre_phrases = []
              for g in genre_objs:
                  sub_phrase = f"{g.lower()}"
                  # collect stylistic origins for this genre
                  origins = [t.object for t in triples if t.subject == g and t.predicate == "stylis...
                  if origins:
                      sub_phrase += f" (stylistic origins: {fmt_list([o.lower() for o in origins])})"
                  # collect fusion genres
                  fusion = [t.object for t in triples if t.subject == g and t.predicate == "musicFu...
                  if fusion:
                      sub_phrase += f", fused with {fmt_list([f.lower() for f in fusion])}"
                  # collect subgenres
                  subgenres = [t.object for t in triples if t.subject == g and t.predicate == "musi...
                  if subgenres:
                      sub_phrase += f", subgenre(s): {fmt_list([sg.lower() for sg in subgenres])}"
                  genre_phrases.append(sub_phrase)
              genre_phrase = f"{subj} is a {fmt_list(genre_phrases)} artist"
              parts.append(genre_phrase)
